code.text: Why Statement
What is your *Why*?

resource.valueString: To thrive in health and creativity with my soulmate Aimee, embracing life’s adventures and the joy of sharing good food.

code.text: What are the biggest challenges you are facing right now?

resource.valueString: Difficulty sleeping. Very limited mobility.

code.text: How are you addressing the challenges that you are facing in order to move forward to your goals?

resource.valueString: One day at a time, focused on progress with PT.

code.text: What would you like to focus on before your next check-in?

resource.valueString: A bit more movement around the house and looking forward to starting to walk after 8 weeks post-surgery.

code.text: What have you accomplished since your last check-in? What were your small or large successes?

resource.valueString: Completed successful knee surgery on June 2nd and making good progress on PT.
